description: Learn the essential skills of frying food safely and effectively.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients and tools: a frying pan, oil, and food to fry.
Demonstrate how to heat the oil to the appropriate temperature.
Show the proper technique for adding food to the hot oil safely.
Monitor the frying process, flipping the food as necessary to ensure even cooking.
Remove the food from the oil and let it drain on paper towels.

safety_tips: Be cautious of hot oil splatters.
Use a splatter guard if necessary.
Always have a lid nearby to cover the pan in case of a fire.
